mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and multiple RTKs to suppress AML proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for HCC, RCC; strong activity in FLT3-ITD AML including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits BCR-ABL and FLT3 kinases
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; very potent in FLT3-ITD AML including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and other RTKs (VEGFR/PDGFR)
additional_notes: Approved for RCC, GIST; active in FLT3-ITD AML

mechanism: Inhibits multiple RTKs including FLT3
additional_notes: Approved for RCC, thyroid cancer; potent in FLT3-ITD AML including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits VEGFR, RET, FGFR; reported to inhibit FLT3
additional_notes: Approved for thyroid, HCC, RCC; active in FLT3-ITD AML models

mechanism: Triple angiokinase inhibitor (VEGFR/FGFR/PDGFR)
additional_notes: Approved for IPF; preclinical activity in FLT3-ITD AML including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits SRC-family kinases and ABL signaling
additional_notes: Approved for CML/Ph+ ALL; activity in MLL/FLT3 AML lines

mechanism: Prodrug of R406; inhibits SYK signaling
additional_notes: Approved for ITP; SYK dependency in MLL-rearranged AML; activity in MOLM-13; active metabolite R406

mechanism: Blocks JAK-STAT signaling
additional_notes: Approved for myelofibrosis and PV; variable single-agent AML activity; consider cytokine-driven contexts

mechanism: Inhibits MEK to block MAPK pathway
additional_notes: Approved for melanoma; MAPK pathway inhibition active in AML; test alone and in combinations

mechanism: Inhibits MEK to suppress MAPK signaling
additional_notes: Approved for NF1-associated PN; MEK inhibition can suppress AML; test on MOLM-13

mechanism: Induces apoptosis via selective BCL-2 inhibition
additional_notes: Approved for CLL/SLL and AML; highly protein-bound; AML line responses vary

mechanism: Inhibits 26S proteasome, inducing apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for multiple myeloma and MCL; potent cytotoxicity in AML including MOLM-13

mechanism: Irreversible 20S proteasome inhibition
additional_notes: Approved for multiple myeloma; strong proteasome-dependent killing in AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits translation elongation (homoharringtonine derivative)
additional_notes: Approved for CML; broad antileukemic activity in AML cell lines

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases causing epigenetic reprogramming
additional_notes: Also known as SAHA; approved for CTCL; activity reported in MOLM-13

mechanism: Potent pan-HDAC inhibition leading to apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for multiple myeloma; active in AML lines

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases to alter gene expression
additional_notes: Approved for PTCL; cytotoxic to AML cell lines

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial protein synthesis, impairing oxidative phosphorylation
additional_notes: Selective OxPhos impairment in AML including MOLM-13

mechanism: Inhibits TrxR causing oxidative stress–mediated cell death
additional_notes: Approved for rheumatoid arthritis; induces oxidative stress in AML cell lines
